title: Ali Brice This Is The Way We Brush Our Teeth
description: I like smiling. But only when I’m unaware of it. If you know you’re smiling, you’re doing it wrong. Unless you’re looking at a camera. Or a dentist. I hope this show makes you smile without realising it. That would make me smile. That’d be nice. It’ll be chaotic, heartfelt and silly. Hopefully. See you there. Cheeeeeeeeeeeeese! **** “ The most entertaining experience I enjoyed at the Fringe” EdFringeReview **** “ A clever, offbeat talent with an appealing penchant for taking risks” Beyond The Joke
